## Annotation Examples

Purpose: Collect exemplar cases for annotation quality review (good, bad, mismatch, hard-to-identify).

### Ideal example



![Ideal example](data:image/png;base64,)


### Good examples


![Good examples](data:image/png;base64,)

_Load of logs (palk) in sawmill storage (ladu). Northing 6437833.59; Easting 646051.20. Stacked timber piles in the sawmill yard._


### Bad examples

<figure>
	<svg width="460" height="120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Bad example thumbnail">
		<rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#fff3f3"/>
		<text x="12" y="36" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:16px; fill:#b71c1c;">Bad example placeholder</text>
		<text x="12" y="64" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:12px; fill:#c62828;">(replace with real thumbnail)</text>
	</svg>
	<figcaption>Bad example — replace with real thumbnail</figcaption>
</figure>

### Mismatch examples

<figure>
	<svg width="460" height="120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Mismatch example thumbnail">
		<rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#fffaf0"/>
		<text x="12" y="36" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:16px; fill:#a65a00;">Mismatch placeholder</text>
		<text x="12" y="64" style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size:12px; fill:#8d6b00;">(replace with real thumbnail)</text>
	</svg>
	<figcaption>Mismatch example — replace with real thumbnail</figcaption>
</figure>

### Hard-to-identify examples



![Hard-to-identify examples](data:image/png;base64,)

_Field potatoes — agricultural ridges/rows that can be mistaken for CDW. L-EST97 E 646601.60; N 6437782.39._


### Notes / Format

- Use the format: `filename.tif | projection EPSG / local name [optional] x, y` followed by a short note explaining why the example is good/bad/mismatch/hard.
- Optionally include a bounding box or tile coordinates and a reference image path.

_Created: 2026-03-27_
